description: Golden evaluation dataset for the BMW X1 Specification Guide (AU, Oct 2021). 'answerable' questions have ground truth in the document; 'unanswerable' questions do NOT and are used to calibrate the retrieval relevance threshold (guardrail).

answerable.question: What is the 0-100 km/h acceleration time of the sDrive20i?
How many cylinders does the sDrive18i engine have?
What is the fuel consumption of the sDrive18d?
What transmission does the sDrive18d use?
What is the model code of the sDrive18d?
How much torque does the sDrive18d produce?
How many speakers does the standard stereo system have?
What does the harman/kardon loudspeaker system include?
What colour are the callipers on the M Sport Brakes?
What split do the foldable rear seats have?
What features are included in the Enhancement Package?
What size is the Navigation System Plus display?

unanswerable.question: What is the capital of France?
How do I bake a chocolate cake?
Who won the 2018 FIFA World Cup?
What is the price of a Tesla Model 3?
